_edit_tip: Add a new class by copying any block below and changing values. id must be unique.
_add_class_steps: 2. Add case in battleManager.js processClassSkill() switch

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: Tank. High HP and defense. Born to endure punishment.
warrior.passive_desc: 15% chance to completely block any incoming attack.
warrior.skill_desc: Stun the enemy for 1 turn. Cooldown: 5 turns.

mage.name: Mage
mage.desc: Glass cannon. Low HP but devastating spell damage.
mage.passive_desc: 20% chance each turn: next attack deals double damage.
mage.skill_desc: 300% damage + forced critical hit. Cooldown: 6 turns.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.desc: Fast and sneaky. Best steal rates. First hit always crits.
rogue.passive_desc: First attack every battle is guaranteed critical hit.
rogue.skill_desc: 200% damage + 50% chance to poison (5% HP/turn). Cooldown: 4 turns.

healer.name: Healer
healer.desc: Support class. Regenerates HP each turn automatically.
healer.passive_desc: Heal 5% max HP at the start of every single turn.
healer.skill_desc: Deal 100% damage AND heal 50% HP. Cooldown: 5 turns.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.desc: Lower HP = more damage. The ultimate risk-reward class.
berserker.passive_desc: +2% attack per 1% HP missing. At 10% HP = +180% ATK.
berserker.skill_desc: Strike 3 times rapidly, scaled by missing HP. Cooldown: 5 turns.
